name: Pickled Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Crab boil, tied in cheese cloth
recipeInstructions:
1. In a kettle, bring 6 cups of water to a boil with the crab boil. Once boiling, simmer for 5 minutes.
2. Add the shrimp and cook for an additional 5 minutes. Drain the shrimp.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together the vinegar, celery seeds, salt, and pepper until well combined.
4. Gradually whisk in the olive oil until emulsified.
5. Arrange half of the shrimp in one layer in a deep glass dish.
6. Place onion slices over the shrimp.
7. Top with bay leaves.
8. Cover with the remaining shrimp, additional onion slices, and bay leaves.
9. Pour the dressing over everything.
10. Let marinate, covered and chilled for 24 hours.
11. Serve the shrimp skewered on picks or with crackers. A Gourmet Mag favorite from 1960.
